reviews.comment:
Parada obligada en mi camino a Pergamino. Las Estaciones de servicio del Automóvil Club Argentino, son un clásico. Espacios arbolados, en el medio del campo, parecen lugares "quedados" en el tiempo . Baños adecuados. Siempre suma en un viaje la excusa de cargar combustible y de paso estirar los pies, despejarse.  Buena atención por parte de todos, desde playeros, hasta quienes atienden el local.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on my way to Pergamino. The Automóvil Club Argentino service stations are a classic. Wooded areas in the middle of the countryside, they seem like places frozen in time. Decent restrooms. It's always a welcome excuse to fill up and stretch your legs and clear your head on a trip. Good service from everyone, from the attendants to the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnc2NQenlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Shop surtido con buenas opciones para almorzar y cenar. Acepta tarjetas. Mala señal celular e internet. Por el momento no tiene WiFi.

(Translated by Google)
A well-stocked shop with good lunch and dinner options. Accepts credit cards. Poor cell phone and internet signal. No Wi-Fi at the moment.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen espacio verde con meses y muy buena tensión tanto en surtidores como en el buffet. Tener cuidado que aveces cortan el suministro de electricidad de arrecifes dejando sin el servicio a la estación y no tienen generadores de emergencia.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice green space with plenty of seating and excellent voltage at both the pumps and the buffet. Be aware that the power supply to the reefs is sometimes cut off, leaving the station without service, and they don't have emergency generators.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbGZlU1BnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Incredible service. They serve a delicious ham, cheese, and Roquefort tart at the bar. They accept cards.
